match.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="ElbowBlade" or defName="HandTalon" or defName="KneeSpike" or defName="VenomFangs" or defName="VenomTalon"]/costList

li.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[(defName="LTS_SubdermalArmour" or defName="LTS_FaceplateArachnid" or defName="LTS_StealthSystem" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedElbowBlade" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedKneeSpike" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Animals" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Artistic" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Construction" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Cooking" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Crafting" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Intellectual" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Medicine" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Melee" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Mining" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Plants" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Shooting" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Social") and costList/ComponentSpacer=6]

Defs/ThingDef[(defName="LTS_SubdermalArmour" or defName="LTS_FaceplateArachnid" or defName="LTS_StealthSystem" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedElbowBlade" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedKneeSpike" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Animals" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Artistic" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Construction" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Cooking" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Crafting" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Intellectual" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Medicine" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Melee" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Mining" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Plants" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Shooting" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Social") and costList/ComponentSpacer=6]/costList

Defs/ThingDef[(defName="LTS_SubdermalArmour" or defName="LTS_FaceplateArachnid" or defName="LTS_StealthSystem" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedElbowBlade" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedKneeSpike" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Animals" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Artistic" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Construction" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Cooking" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Crafting" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Intellectual" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Medicine" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Melee" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Mining" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Plants" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Shooting" or defName="LTS_SpacerSkillChip_Social") and costList/ComponentSpacer=6]/costList/ComponentSpacer
Defs/ThingDef[(defName="BiochameleonDevice" or defName="LTS_ShoulderMortar" or defName="LTS_ShoulderRocketPod") and costList/ComponentSpacer=5]
Defs/ThingDef[(defName="BiochameleonDevice" or defName="LTS_ShoulderMortar" or defName="LTS_ShoulderRocketPod") and costList/ComponentSpacer=5]/costList

Defs/ThingDef[(@Name="LTS_BaseModuleItem" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_Targeting" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_Telescopic" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_NightVision" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_ProtectiveLens" or defName="BiotunerImplant" or defName="CranialInsulation" or defName="HackingPortImplant" or defName="LTS_CellularAdapter" or defName="LTS_ShoulderBeamTurret" or defName="LTS_ShoulderChargeTurret" or defName="HemoFangs" or defName="TacticalCorneaImplant" or defName="AC_RogianArmBlade" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedHandTalon" or defName="EPOE_ScytherElbowBlade" or defName="EPOE_ScytherKneeSpike") and costList/ComponentSpacer=4]

Defs/ThingDef[(@Name="LTS_BaseModuleItem" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_Targeting" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_Telescopic" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_NightVision" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_ProtectiveLens" or defName="BiotunerImplant" or defName="CranialInsulation" or defName="HackingPortImplant" or defName="LTS_CellularAdapter" or defName="LTS_ShoulderBeamTurret" or defName="LTS_ShoulderChargeTurret" or defName="HemoFangs" or defName="TacticalCorneaImplant" or defName="AC_RogianArmBlade" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedHandTalon" or defName="EPOE_ScytherElbowBlade" or defName="EPOE_ScytherKneeSpike") and costList/ComponentSpacer=4]/costList

Defs/ThingDef[(@Name="LTS_BaseModuleItem" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_Targeting" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_Telescopic" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_NightVision" or defName="LTS_ModuleEye_ProtectiveLens" or defName="BiotunerImplant" or defName="CranialInsulation" or defName="HackingPortImplant" or defName="LTS_CellularAdapter" or defName="LTS_ShoulderBeamTurret" or defName="LTS_ShoulderChargeTurret" or defName="HemoFangs" or defName="TacticalCorneaImplant" or defName="AC_RogianArmBlade" or defName="EPOE_AdvancedHandTalon" or defName="EPOE_ScytherElbowBlade" or defName="EPOE_ScytherKneeSpike") and costList/ComponentSpacer=4]/costList/ComponentSpacer
